metadata.source_authority: Ministry of Gender, Labour and Social Development (Expanding Social Protection programme)
metadata.source_note: The SAGE Handbook from the Expanding Social Protection programme's own site (socialprotection.go.ug): chapter 3 (identification and selection - the NIRA-derived 80-years-and- above national rule and the FY2016/17 rollout districts' oldest-100-per-subcounty selection), the rollout-history pages, and chapter 8 (the Shs. 25,000 monthly amount and its basis). Administrative programme documentation - the Ghana LEAP precedent for policy-class captures.
metadata.title: MGLSD Expanding Social Protection — SAGE Handbook (Senior Citizens Grant eligibility and amount)
